description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the viraweb/mblowfish-angularjs-builder:1.0.0 Docker image and caching the node_modules directory. Define two stages: build and deploy. In the build stage add a grunt_build job that runs npm install, bower install --allow-root --no-interactive, chmod 777 -fR ., su builder -c "grunt", and find . -name lcov.info | xargs -d '\n' cat | node_modules/.bin/codacy-coverage -t $CODACY_PROJECT_TOKEN; it runs only on master and develop branches, stores ./${CI_PROJECT_NAME}.zip and ./doc as artifacts, and records coverage with the regex /Lines\s*:\s*(\d+\.\d+)%/. In the deploy stage add a marketplace_deploy job that runs npm install, bower install --allow-root --no-interactive, chmod 777 -fR ., su builder -c "grunt build", and curl -F "file=@./${CI_PROJECT_NAME}.zip" https://hub.viraweb123.ir/api/v2/marketplace/spas/token-$MARKETPLACE_TOKEN; it runs only on the master branch and uploads the zip to the Viraweb marketplace.
